title: Better Ores Outlines
description: Better Ores Outlines enhances the visibility of ores by adding clean, bold outlines while keeping the original vanilla style. It makes mining easier and faster without changing the overall look of the game.
body:
# Better Ores Outlines
This texture pack gives ores a clean, bold outline to make them easier to spot while mining. It keeps the vanilla look, just more visible—perfect for PvP, SMP, and survival grinding.
## Compatibility
- Tested on: 1.21.5 – 1.20.6 (Main: 1.21+)
- Other versions: Not tested

## Requirements
- **No mods required**, this pack works on vanilla Minecraft.

## Credits
- Pack created by **[_Melted](https://modrinth.com/user/_Melted)**.
